# Andrey Bygg — Professionell Bygg & Renovering

Professional building and renovation services in Sweden (Laholm, Halmstad, Båstad, Ängelholm, Markaryd).

## Pages

- [Home](/) — Main page with services overview
- [Window & Door Installation](/services/windows-doors) — Inner/outer doors and energy-efficient windows
- [Kitchen Assembly](/services/kitchen-assembly) — IKEA kitchen assembly and countertops
- [Bathroom Renovation](/services/bathroom-renovation) — Wet room tiling and piping
- [Tiling](/services/tiling) — Tile installation for walls and floors
- [Painting](/services/painting) — Facade and interior wall painting
- [Roofing & Woodwork](/services/roofing-woodwork) — Terraces, decks, and roof replacements
- [Gallery](/gallery) — Photos of completed carpentry and renovation projects
- [Contacts](/contacts) — Get project consultation and request cost quote

- [English](/en)
